title: THE IMPORTANCE OF SIMPLIFYING THE PROCEDURE FOR OBTAINING CITIZENSHIP IN UZBEKISTAN
author: Ruziyev, Zafar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article examines the importance and necessity of obtaining citizenship in the today's globalization, the implemented reforms to simplfy and optimize the procedures for obtaining citizenship and their results in recent years in the Republic of Uzbekistan.
steps_raw: The article examines the importance and necessity of obtaining citizenship in the today's globalization, the implemented reforms to simplfy and optimize the procedures for obtaining citizenship and their results in recent years in the Republic of Uzbekistan.
